quotes:
The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

intent: Maintain established brand color presence and hierarchy across banner executions.
rule_text: The brand colors must adhere strictly to the specified hierarchy order: (1) Dominant: Deep Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529B), (2) Secondary Accent: Amber Orange (color.primary.sunshine = #FAA31B), and (3) Tertiary Accent: Golden Yellow (color.primary.gold = #FFC60A).
